items.markdown:
Vitamin D deficiency is frequently silent, but it can cause `persistent fatigue, general muscle weakness, achy or throbbing bone pain (particularly in the lower back or legs), and a compromised immune system leading to frequent illnesses` . Severe or prolonged deficiency can cause mood changes like depression.[](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/15050-vitamin-d-vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/15050-vitamin-d-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.endocrinecenter.com/blog/10-unexpected-signs-of-a-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_UYmVkBbuzg&t=122)

The signs and symptoms of a deficiency depend heavily on the severity and age, but can be grouped into several key areas:[[1]](https://www.nebraskamed.com/primary-care/9-vitamin-d-deficiency-symptoms-and-11-high-vitamin-d-foods)[[2]](https://emedicine.medscape.com/article/128762-overview)[[3]](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/15050-vitamin-d-vitamin-d-deficiency)

Bone and Joint Pain

- **Deep bone pain:** A dull, aching pain felt inside the bones, particularly in the pelvis, lower back, hips, and legs.
- **Fractures and weakness:** In adults, low vitamin D impairs calcium absorption, which can lead to weakened bones (osteopenia or osteoporosis) and an increased risk of bone fractures from minor falls.[](https://www.merckmanuals.com/home/disorders-of-nutrition/vitamins/vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://www.merckmanuals.com/home/disorders-of-nutrition/vitamins/vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AXq2ZdXXFCU)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cz1IU-6Q7kE)

Muscle Symptoms

- **Aches and cramps:** Vitamin D is crucial for muscle contraction; a lack of it can lead to frequent muscle aches and painful cramps.
- **Weakness:** Noticeable loss of muscle strength, which can manifest as difficulty climbing stairs or getting up from a chair.[](https://www.endocrinecenter.com/blog/10-unexpected-signs-of-a-vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://www.endocrinecenter.com/blog/10-unexpected-signs-of-a-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.bswhealth.com/blog/7-signs-you-may-be-vitamin-d-deficient)[[3]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_UYmVkBbuzg&t=122)

Immunity and Fatigue

- **Frequent infections:** Vitamin D is essential for a robust immune system. If you are catching colds, flu, or other infections easily, it may be a warning sign.
- **Persistent fatigue:** Feeling constantly drained, sleepy, or experiencing low energy despite adequate rest.[](https://www.endocrinecenter.com/blog/10-unexpected-signs-of-a-vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://www.endocrinecenter.com/blog/10-unexpected-signs-of-a-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9hbUuSzGHik&t=15)[[3]](https://www.unitypoint.org/news-and-articles/how-to-spot-a-vitamin-d-deficiency)

Mood and Mental Health

- **Depression and anxiety:** Low levels of vitamin D are often linked to a sour mood, irritability, or feelings of persistent sadness.[](https://www.unitypoint.org/news-and-articles/how-to-spot-a-vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://www.unitypoint.org/news-and-articles/how-to-spot-a-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9hbUuSzGHik&t=15)

Symptoms in Children

- **Rickets:** Severe lack of vitamin D in children causes rickets, which leads to developmental delays, bone deformities (such as bowed legs or knock-knees), and muscle spasms.[](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/15050-vitamin-d-vitamin-d-deficiency) [[1]](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/diseases/15050-vitamin-d-vitamin-d-deficiency)[[2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_UYmVkBbuzg&t=122)[[3]](https://www.merckmanuals.com/home/disorders-of-nutrition/vitamins/vitamin-d-deficiency)

If you suspect you have a vitamin D deficiency, you should consult your doctor. A healthcare provider can order a simple blood test (the 25-hydroxy vitamin D test) to determine your exact levels and recommend appropriate supplementation or lifestyle adjustments.[](https://www.nebraskamed.com/primary-care/9-vitamin-d-deficiency-symptoms-and-11-high-vitamin-d-foods) [[1]](https://www.nebraskamed.com/primary-care/9-vitamin-d-deficiency-symptoms-and-11-high-vitamin-d-foods)[[2]](https://www.aafp.org/afp/2009/1015/p841)[[3]](https://www.yalemedicine.org/conditions/vitamin-d-deficiency)[[4]](https://www.goodrx.com/conditions/vitamin-d-deficiency)[[5]](https://ubiehealth.com/doctors-note/vitamin-d-deficiency-symptoms-subtle-md-overlook4262q2)

Severe or prolonged deficiency can cause mood changes like depression. Cleveland Clinic +2
